gt_sql: SELECT T2.Name FROM users AS T1 INNER JOIN badges AS T2 ON T1.Id = T2.UserId WHERE T1.DisplayName = 'DatEpicCoderGuyWhoPrograms'
pred_sql: SELECT b.Name FROM badges b JOIN users u ON b.UserId = u.Id WHERE TRIM(u.DisplayName) = 'DatEpicCoderGuyWhoPrograms';
question: For the user whose display name is "DatEpicCoderGuyWhoPrograms", what is his/her badge's name?
